mapper.select:
SELECT id, title, content, notice_type AS type, notice_status AS status, is_pinned AS pinned, author_name AS author, published_at AS publishedAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM admin_notices WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{search}, '%')
AND notice_type = #{type}
ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT id, title, content, notice_type AS type, notice_status AS status, is_pinned AS pinned, author_name AS author, published_at AS publishedAt, created_at AS createdAt FROM admin_notices WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
